name: io.github.atef-ataya/depwire
description: The missing context layer for AI coding assistants. Builds a complete dependency graph of your codebase using tree-sitter and serves it via 16 MCP tools. Features: impact analysis, dead code detection, architecture health scoring (0-100), What If simulation (simulate delete/move/rename/split/merge before touching code), temporal graph, arc diagram visualization, and AI codebase chat. Supports TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, and C. Zero config — works with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code, and any MCP-compatible tool.
